metadata.title: Simple Note Review
metadata.description: Simple, customizable plugin for easy note review, resurfacing  & repetition.

regex.target: .error(`简易笔记复习 - dataview API错误: ${error.message}`)

regex.source: name: "Start reviewing notes in current note set"
regex.target: name: "开始复习当前笔记集中的笔记"

regex.source: name: "Open random note from the current note set"
regex.target: name: "从当前笔记集中打开随机笔记"

regex.source: name: "reset queue for the current note set"
regex.target: name: "重置当前笔记集的队列"
name: "将当前笔记标记为已复习"

regex.source: name: "Set review frequency to none (ignore this note in all reviews)"
regex.target: name: "将复习频率设为无（在所有复习中忽略此笔记）"
name: "在当前复习中跳过笔记"

regex.source: .setName("If tags are specified, match notes with:")
.setName("If folders *and* tags are specified, match notes with: ")
regex.target: .setName("如果指定了文件夹*和*标签，匹配笔记：")

regex.source: .setName("Open next note in the note set after reviewing a note")
regex.target: .setName("复习完笔记后打开笔记集中的下一个笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("If omitted, the name will be created from tags, folders, or dataviewJS query (if these are set).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果省略，将从标签、文件夹或dataviewJS查询（如果设置了这些）中创建名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`One or more tags, separated by comma. Note set will contain notes tagged with ${this._noteSet.tagsJoinType === "and" /* AND */ ? "all" : "any"} of these. Example: #review, #knowledge`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`一个或多个标签，用逗号分隔。笔记集将包含标记为${this._noteSet.tagsJoinType === "and" /* AND */ ? "所有" : "任意"}的笔记。例如：#review, #knowledge`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`One or more folder paths relative to vault root, surrounded by quotes and separated by comma. Note set will contain notes located in any of these. Top-level folders must not contain slash in their path.  Example: "notes", "notes/programming"`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`一个或多个相对于库根目录的文件夹路径，用引号括起来并用逗号分隔。笔记集将包含位于其中任何一个文件夹中的笔记。顶级文件夹路径中不得包含斜杠。例如："notes", "notes/programming"`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`DataviewJS-style query for more flexible control over the note set. If used, *overrides* Tags & Folders. Example: "(#knowledge and #review) or ('./notes')"`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`DataviewJS风格的查询，用于更灵活地控制笔记集。如果使用，将*覆盖*标签和文件夹。例如："(#knowledge and #review) or ('./notes')"`)

regex.source: .setDesc("After marking note as reviewed, automatically open next note in the note set.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将笔记标记为已复习后，自动打开笔记集中的下一个笔记。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set review frequency level (high, normal, low, ignore) for each note. Notes with higher review frequency will be presented for review more often. Default is 'normal'.")
regex.target: .setDesc("为每个笔记设置复习频率级别（高、正常、低、忽略）。复习频率较高的笔记将更频繁地呈现进行复习。默认是'正常'。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Start review with notes that have no review date. If turned off, notes without the review date will have lower priority than notes with early review dates.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从没有复习日期的笔记开始复习。如果关闭，没有复习日期的笔记将比有早期复习日期的笔记优先级低。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Select a note set to start reviewing notes")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("选择一个笔记集开始复习笔记")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Reset review queue and update stats for this note set")
regex.target: .setTooltip("重置复习队列并更新此笔记集的统计信息")

regex.source: .setTooltip("mark current note as reviewed & go to the next file")
regex.target: .setTooltip("将当前笔记标记为已复习并转到下一个文件")

regex.source: .setTooltip("open random note from this note set")
regex.target: .setTooltip("从此笔记集中打开随机笔记")

regex.source: .setTooltip("reset review queue for this note set")
